qry:select.name: QRY_PARAMETRO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro,ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro in (\'WebReclutados\',\'WebInternos\') ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' {%? (#SOURCE:@maxsize != '') {% MAXSIZE {%=#SOURCE:@maxsize%} %} {% %} %}
SELECT avi.oi_aviso, avi.c_aviso, avi.f_aviso, avi.f_cierre, avi.c_sexo, avi.o_aviso, avi.d_mail, avi.c_tipo, avi.oi_pais, avi.oi_provincia, avi.oi_localidad, avi.oi_jerarquia, avi.oi_puesto, avi.oi_area, avi.d_puesto as d_puesto_aviso,
pais.d_pais, prov.d_provincia, loc.d_localidad,
jer.d_jerarquia, pu.d_puesto, a.d_area,
postu.f_postulacion
FROM SDP05_AVISOS as avi, ORG35_PAISES as pais, ORG35_PROVINCIAS as prov, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as loc, SDP07_JERARQUIA as jer, ORG04_PUESTOS as pu, SDP09_AREAS as a,
SDP01_POSTU_CV(SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv = {%? (#SOURCE:@oi_cv='') {%='0'%} {%=#SOURCE:@oi_cv%} %}) as postu
JOIN avi.oi_pais LEFT OUTER pais.oi_pais, avi.oi_provincia LEFT OUTER prov.oi_provincia, avi.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER loc.oi_localidad, avi.oi_jerarquia LEFT OUTER jer.oi_jerarquia, avi.oi_puesto LEFT OUTER pu.oi_puesto, avi.oi_area LEFT OUTER a.oi_area,
{%? (#SOURCE:@postus = '1') {% avi.oi_aviso INNER postu.oi_aviso %} {% avi.oi_aviso LEFT OUTER postu.oi_aviso %} %}
WHERE
{%? (#PARAMIN:@d_valorInternos != '1') {% contain(avi.c_tipo, \'E\') %} {% 1=1 %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@postus='') {% {%? (#PARAMIN:@d_valorReclutados != '1') {% AND avi.c_estado in (\'P\') %} {% AND avi.c_estado in (\'P\',\'R\') %} %} AND avi.f_aviso <= {Datetime(floor(now()))} AND (IsNull(avi.f_cierre) OR avi.f_cierre >= {Datetime(floor(now()))}) AND avi.l_publicar = 1 %} {% AND avi.l_publicar = 1 AND (avi.oi_aviso in (select SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_aviso from SDP01_POSTU_CV where SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv = {%=#SOURCE:@oi_cv%})) %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@p_clave != '') {% AND ( contain(avi.c_aviso, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(avi.o_aviso, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(avi.d_puesto, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR
contain(pais.d_pais, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(prov.d_provincia, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(loc.d_localidad, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR
contain(jer.d_jerarquia, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(pu.d_puesto, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') OR contain(a.d_area, \'{%= #SOURCE:@p_clave%}\') ) %} {% %} %}
ORDER BY f_aviso DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

img.title: Ya estoy postulado a esta oferta.

td.xsl:if: No existen ofertas activas por el momento.
La búsqueda realizada no arroja resultados.
